vocab.meaning: cảnh tượng toàn cảnh đẹp đến nghẹt thở
vocab.example: At the summit, we were greeted by a breathtaking panorama of the snow-capped Andes.

vocab.meaning: vùng hoang dã nguyên sơ (chưa bị con người tác động)
vocab.example: Iceland offers some of the most stunning examples of unspoilt wilderness I’ve ever had the privilege to witness.

vocab.meaning: những thung lũng xanh tươi mỡ màng
vocab.example: The train ride through Switzerland revealed a succession of verdant valleys dotted with traditional chalets.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thanh tao, siêu thực (như không thuộc về thế giới này)
vocab.example: There was an ethereal beauty to the morning mist clinging to the surface of the silent lake.

vocab.meaning: đường bờ biển gồ ghề, hiểm trở nhưng hùng vĩ
vocab.example: The rugged coastline of Ireland is famous for its dramatic cliffs and crashing Atlantic waves.

vocab.meaning: làn nước trong suốt như pha lê
vocab.example: We spent the afternoon snorkeling in the crystalline waters of the Maldives, seeing every detail of the seabed.
The Sagrada Familia is an architectural marvel that completely redefined my perception of beauty in design.

vocab.meaning: một nơi ẩn náu/khu bảo tồn tinh khôi, sạch sẽ
vocab.example: The remote island felt like a pristine sanctuary, far removed from the chaos of modern civilization.

vocab.meaning: một sự kết hợp đa dạng, rực rỡ sắc màu
vocab.example: The autumn forest in Japan was a kaleidoscope of colors, with every shade of red, orange, and gold imaginable.

vocab.meaning: một dải/vùng rộng lớn bao la
vocab.example: Looking out over the vast expanse of the Grand Canyon makes you realize how insignificant humans are in the face of nature.
